'''safuru''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nicheness|nicheness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-f-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nicheness|nicheness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| safuru
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæfirith|sæfirith]] || [[word:sæfirij|sæfirij]] || [[word:sæfirish|sæfirish]] || [[word:sæfiri|sæfiri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:safufuruth|safufuruth]] || [[word:safufuruj|safufuruj]] || [[word:safufurush|safufurush]] || [[word:safufuru|safufuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:safuruth|safuruth]] || [[word:safuruj|safuruj]] || [[word:safurush|safurush]] || [[word:safuru|safuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:safufruth|safufruth]] || [[word:safufruj|safufruj]] || [[word:safufrush|safufrush]] || [[word:safufruf|safufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:safuruthu|safuruthu]] || [[word:safuruju|safuruju]] || [[word:safurushu|safurushu]] || [[word:safuruku|safuruku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:safuruth|safuruth]] || [[word:safuruj|safuruj]] || [[word:safurush|safurush]] || [[word:safuru|safuru]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:safuruthul|safuruthul]] || [[word:safurujul|safurujul]] || [[word:safurushul|safurushul]] || [[word:safurukul|safurukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:safuruthuthu|safuruthuthu]] || [[word:safurujuju|safurujuju]] || [[word:safurushushu|safurushushu]] || [[word:safuruku|safuruku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:safuruthun|safuruthun]] || [[word:safurujun|safurujun]] || [[word:safurushun|safurushun]] || [[word:safurukun|safurukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:safuruthuoro|safuruthuoro]] || [[word:safurujuoro|safurujuoro]] || [[word:safurushuoro|safurushuoro]] || [[word:safurukuoro|safurukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
